name: Southwest Rapid Rewards® Premier Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 60,000 bonus Rapid Rewards points after spending $3,000 in first 3 months (worth ~$894 toward Southwest flights at 1.49¢/point)

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Points
annual_credits.description: 6,000 Rapid Rewards anniversary points each year (worth ~$90 at 1.5¢/point)

other_benefits.name: Two EarlyBird Check-Ins Per Year
other_benefits.description: Complimentary EarlyBird Check-In automatically applied to reservation when booked with card (up to 2 per year)

other_benefits.name: First Bag Free
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same reservation (when using the card)

notes: Mid-tier Southwest card. $149 AF, but 6,000 anniversary points (~$90) covers ~60%. First bag free + EarlyBird Check-In are practical perks. As of 2025, AF increased from $99 to $149. Better earning on Southwest (3x vs 2x) than Plus. Good for regular Southwest flyers who want A-List qualifying points.
